dishes.title: Chicken Salad Bowl
dishes.preparation: Add greens to a bowl. Top with sliced chicken, cucumber, and tomatoes. Serve dressing on the side and toss before eating.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use chicken as the main anchor and keep dressing measured or served on the side.
swaps: Swap mixed greens for romaine or spinach.
dishes.notes: Useful as a simple lunch template for busy clinic clients.

dishes.title: Greek Yogurt Berry Bowl
dishes.preparation: Spoon yogurt into a bowl. Add berries and chia seeds. Add a small amount of granola if included in the plan.
dishes.portionGuidance: Keep yogurt as the base and use toppings as accents rather than filling the whole bowl.
dishes.notes: Easy breakfast or structured snack option.

dishes.title: Salmon Vegetable Plate
dishes.preparation: Season salmon with lemon, pepper, and herbs. Bake or pan-sear until cooked through. Serve with warm vegetables.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use the salmon as the main protein and fill the rest of the plate mostly with vegetables.
dishes.notes: Good dinner option when the patient prefers a simple plate format.

dishes.title: Tofu Grain Bowl
dishes.preparation: Cook tofu in a nonstick pan until lightly browned. Add rice and vegetables to a bowl. Top with tofu and dressing on the side.
dishes.portionGuidance: Keep the grain portion moderate and make vegetables the largest visual part of the bowl.
dishes.notes: Good vegetarian template for meal prep.

dishes.title: Egg and Spinach Breakfast Plate
dishes.preparation: Warm oil in a pan. Saute spinach briefly, then add eggs and cook to preference. Serve with pico de gallo.
dishes.portionGuidance: Keep the plate simple and use vegetables to add volume without making breakfast heavy.
swaps: Swap pico de gallo for sliced tomato.

dishes.title: Overnight Oats with Berries
dishes.preparation: Combine oats, yogurt, and milk in a container. Refrigerate overnight. Add berries before serving.
dishes.portionGuidance: Prepare in a single-serving container to keep the portion consistent through the week.
swaps: Swap yogurt for a dairy-free option if needed.
dishes.notes: Good for patients with rushed mornings.

dishes.title: Turkey Lettuce Wraps
dishes.preparation: Lay lettuce leaves flat. Spread a thin layer of hummus, add turkey and carrots, then roll into wraps.
dishes.portionGuidance: Serve with a side of vegetables or fruit depending on the meal plan structure.

dishes.title: Chicken Fajita Bowl
dishes.preparation: Cook peppers and onions until tender. Add chicken and beans to a bowl. Top with vegetables and salsa.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use beans as the planned starch component and keep toppings simple.
swaps: Swap black beans for pinto beans.
dishes.notes: Homemade alternative to a restaurant bowl.

dishes.title: Bean and Vegetable Soup
dishes.preparation: Simmer beans, vegetables, and broth until vegetables are tender. Finish with cilantro and adjust seasoning.
dishes.portionGuidance: Serve as a complete bowl or pair with a simple side salad if more volume is needed.
swaps: Add shredded chicken if a non-vegetarian version is needed.
dishes.notes: Good batch-cook dish for cooler weeks.

dishes.title: Cottage Cheese Fruit Plate
dishes.preparation: Add cottage cheese to a small plate or bowl. Serve with sliced fruit and optional nuts.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use as a structured snack rather than grazing from the container.
swaps: Swap cottage cheese for Greek yogurt.

dishes.title: Tuna Cucumber Boats
dishes.preparation: Mix tuna with yogurt and celery. Spoon into cucumber halves and season lightly.
dishes.portionGuidance: Serve as a snack or light meal component based on the plan.
swaps: Swap cucumber for bell pepper halves.
dishes.notes: Keep seasoning simple for patient tolerance.

dishes.title: Lentil Quinoa Bowl
dishes.preparation: Layer quinoa, lentils, and vegetables in a bowl. Add lemon dressing just before serving.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use lentils and quinoa as the structured base and keep vegetables generous.
dishes.notes: Works well for vegetarian meal prep.

dishes.title: Shrimp Zucchini Skillet
dishes.preparation: Cook shrimp in a warm pan until opaque. Add zucchini and peppers and cook until tender-crisp.
dishes.portionGuidance: Make vegetables the bulk of the skillet and keep oil measured.

dishes.title: Chicken Rice Vegetable Plate
dishes.preparation: Arrange chicken, rice, and vegetables on a plate. Add salsa or herbs for flavor.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use the rice as the planned side and keep vegetables visible on at least half the plate.

dishes.title: Avocado Egg Toast
dishes.preparation: Toast bread. Spread mashed avocado, top with egg and diced tomato.
dishes.portionGuidance: Keep avocado measured and pair with fruit or vegetables if the plan calls for more volume.
dishes.notes: Good weekend or light weekday breakfast.

dishes.title: Vegetable Omelet
dishes.preparation: Cook vegetables in a nonstick pan. Add beaten eggs and cook until set. Fold and serve warm.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use vegetables generously and keep cheese optional or measured.
swaps: Swap cheese for avocado on the side.

dishes.title: Chickpea Mediterranean Salad
dishes.preparation: Combine chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, and optional feta. Toss with lemon and herbs.
dishes.portionGuidance: Serve as a main lunch salad or pair with extra greens for more volume.

dishes.title: Turkey Meatball Plate
dishes.preparation: Bake turkey meatballs until cooked through. Warm sauce and serve over zucchini noodles or vegetables.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use meatballs as the protein portion and keep sauce and cheese moderate.
swaps: Swap zucchini noodles for whole grain pasta if assigned.

dishes.title: Fish Taco Plate
dishes.preparation: Season fish and cook until flaky. Warm tortillas and fill with fish, slaw, and salsa.
dishes.portionGuidance: Keep tortillas to the planned amount and use slaw for crunch and volume.

dishes.title: Protein Smoothie Cup
dishes.preparation: Blend milk, protein option, berries, and flaxseed until smooth. Serve immediately.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use as a structured breakfast or snack, not as an add-on to a full meal unless assigned.
dishes.notes: Keep recipe simple to avoid oversized smoothies.

dishes.title: Roasted Chicken and Vegetables
dishes.preparation: Season chicken and vegetables. Roast on a sheet pan until chicken is cooked and vegetables are tender.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use the sheet pan to pre-portion meals before storing leftovers.

dishes.title: Caprese Chicken Plate
dishes.preparation: Plate grilled chicken with tomato, mozzarella, and basil. Add balsamic vinegar if desired.
dishes.portionGuidance: Keep cheese as an accent and add extra greens if more volume is needed.

dishes.title: Cauliflower Turkey Skillet
dishes.preparation: Cook turkey in a skillet. Add cauliflower rice, bell pepper, and salsa. Cook until heated through.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use cauliflower rice for volume and keep added sauces simple.
swaps: Swap cauliflower rice for brown rice if assigned.

dishes.title: Hummus Veggie Snack Box
dishes.preparation: Place hummus in a small container. Pack sliced vegetables and optional crackers separately.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use the hummus as the measured dip and vegetables as the main volume.
swaps: Swap hummus for Greek yogurt dip.

dishes.title: Black Bean Breakfast Tacos
dishes.preparation: Warm tortillas and beans. Add egg if included. Top with salsa and serve.
dishes.portionGuidance: Keep tortillas to the planned amount and use beans as the main filling.
swaps: Swap black beans for pinto beans.
dishes.notes: Works well for Mexican-inspired breakfast plans.

dishes.title: Chicken Tortilla Soup
dishes.preparation: Simmer chicken, broth, and zucchini until warm and tender. Top with baked tortilla strips if included.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use tortilla strips as a topping rather than the base of the meal.

dishes.title: Oatmeal with Apple and Cinnamon
dishes.preparation: Cook oats with water or milk. Stir in apple and cinnamon near the end of cooking.
dishes.portionGuidance: Serve in one bowl and add protein on the side if assigned by the nutritionist.

dishes.title: Egg Salad Cucumber Cups
dishes.preparation: Mix chopped eggs with yogurt and mustard. Spoon onto thick cucumber slices.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use as a planned snack or light meal component.

dishes.title: Simple Chicken Quesadilla
dishes.preparation: Fill tortilla with chicken and measured cheese. Heat in a pan until crisp and warmed through. Serve with salsa.
dishes.portionGuidance: Keep cheese measured and pair with salad or vegetables when possible.
swaps: Swap tortilla for a corn tortilla option.

dishes.title: Vegetarian Stuffed Peppers
dishes.preparation: Fill pepper halves with beans, quinoa, and tomato sauce. Bake until peppers are tender.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use each pepper half as a natural portion guide.
swaps: Add chicken if a non-vegetarian version is needed.

dishes.title: Salmon Salad Lettuce Cups
dishes.preparation: Mix flaked salmon with yogurt and celery. Spoon into lettuce leaves and serve chilled.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use lettuce cups to keep the meal light and structured.
swaps: Swap lettuce cups for cucumber slices.

dishes.title: Turkey Burger Salad Plate
dishes.preparation: Cook turkey patty until done. Serve over salad greens with avocado and dressing on the side.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use the salad as the base and keep avocado and dressing measured.
swaps: Swap turkey patty for chicken patty.
Swap avocado for cheese if assigned.
dishes.notes: Burger-style meal without making the bun central.

dishes.title: Banana Yogurt Snack Cup
dishes.preparation: Layer yogurt and banana in a small cup. Add cinnamon and optional nut butter.
dishes.portionGuidance: Keep this as a snack-sized serving and avoid adding multiple extra toppings.
swaps: Swap nut butter for chopped nuts.

dishes.title: Grilled Chicken Tacos
dishes.preparation: Warm tortillas. Fill with grilled chicken, pico de gallo, and cabbage. Serve salsa on the side.
dishes.portionGuidance: Keep tortillas to the planned amount and use cabbage or vegetables for extra volume.

dishes.title: Veggie Scramble Bowl
dishes.preparation: Cook vegetables in a nonstick pan. Add eggs or tofu and scramble until cooked. Top with salsa.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use beans only when included in the plan and keep vegetables as the base.

dishes.title: Chicken Vegetable Stir-Fry
dishes.preparation: Cook chicken in a hot pan. Add vegetables and cook until tender-crisp. Finish with measured sauce.
dishes.portionGuidance: Make vegetables the largest part of the meal and include rice only when planned.

dishes.title: Ricotta Berry Toast
dishes.preparation: Toast bread. Spread ricotta and top with berries and cinnamon.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use as a light breakfast or snack depending on the plan.
dishes.notes: Simple sweet option without heavy preparation.

dishes.title: Chicken Nopal Salad
dishes.preparation: Combine nopales, tomato, onion, and cilantro. Top with grilled chicken and season with lime.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use nopales as a filling vegetable base and keep added fats measured.
swaps: Swap nopales for green beans if needed.

dishes.title: Panela Vegetable Plate
dishes.preparation: Warm panela lightly in a pan or serve cold. Plate with grilled vegetables, salsa, and tortillas if included.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use panela as the protein-style anchor and keep tortillas to the planned amount.

dishes.title: Sardine Avocado Salad
dishes.preparation: Place greens in a bowl. Top with sardines and avocado. Finish with lemon juice.
dishes.portionGuidance: Use avocado as a measured fat source and keep the salad base generous.
